source_pr.title: test: fix TestPrevTraceIDPersistence
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #64267 ref #64008

Problem Summary:

Fix flaky test.

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: `TestPrevTraceIDPersistence` was flaky because the trace/flight-recorder buffer can include `stmt.start` events from background operations; the test could pick the wrong event and fail nondeterministically.
failure_signature: traceevent integration test: intermittent mismatch/absence of expected `prev_trace_id` because the test matched a background `stmt.start` event
root_cause_explanation: The test iterated over recorded trace events and looked for a `stmt.start` event to validate `prev_trace_id`, but background statements can also emit `stmt.start` events into the same recorder. Without filtering, the test could validate the wrong event depending on timing/order, leading to flakiness. This PR fixes it by filtering `stmt.start` events by the expected `trace_id` (the second statement) before checking `prev_trace_id`.
fix_pattern: When asserting trace events in shared recorders, filter to the specific statement/event of interest (e.g., match `trace_id`) to avoid background-operation noise causing nondeterministic failures.
analysis:
PR title: test: fix TestPrevTraceIDPersistence
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/64380
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: Fix flaky test.
Changed files (1): pkg/util/traceevent/integration_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
